asset.title: L2 Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step visualization of a Compare-And-Set (CAS) cell edit workflow. It effectively demonstrates locking, reading, writing, and versioning in a clean, legible UI.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step captions and UI state changes clearly illustrate the CAS (Compare-And-Set) mechanism.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire lifecycle from initial state, locking, reading, writing, to the final unlocked V2 state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode table layout with clear visual cues for locked and updated states.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with the spreadsheet versioning and multi-agent coordination theme.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity UI capture that realistically demonstrates the protocol flow.

legibility.evidence: High-contrast text and clear step indicators make it easy to read even at smaller sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers interested in concurrency control and collaborative data workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the step-by-step execution of a single write operation without embellishment.

observedEvidence: Table showing financial metrics with version numbers
Locking state change on the Net Income row
Value update from empty to +22.4% with version bump to V2
Step-by-step progress captions at the bottom
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Step-by-step execution of a Compare-And-Set (CAS) write operation, ensuring safe concurrent edits with automatic versioning.
